name: marketing-kit
description: 13 battle-tested marketing skills for AI agents: SEO groundwork (search engines, GA4/GTM, local SEO, publish checklist), Zernio paid ads, free newsletters via Resend, universal CRM connection, Instagram card news, presentation decks, Instantly cold email, pre-meeting research briefs, AI-text humanizer, brand guide extraction, YC-style idea validation, viral stunt ideas, and first-principles business coaching.
